title: Malty Juicy Slovakian Pork Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring malty and juicy pork dumplings, seasoned with sea salt and served in a light brine broth. This recipe is a hearty and flavorful representation of Slovakian cuisine.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground pork, flour, malt syrup, sea salt, and black pepper.
Mix the ingredients together until they are just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Add the egg to the mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Bring the brine to a boil in a large pot and add the caraway seeds.
Carefully add the dumplings to the boiling brine and cook for 10 minutes.
Remove the dumplings from the brine with a slotted spoon and serve hot.
